nodes.label: Freemium + PPV Business Model
nodes.rationale: Free signup with revenue from per-bundle unlocks, per-post unlocks, PPV chat messages, and Fanvue redirect. Subscription model repurposed as free follower record. Chosen over subscription-first to reduce friction and bypass payment processor restrictions on adult platforms.

nodes.label: V3 Design System (terracotta/navy/cream palette)
nodes.rationale: Unified palette: terracotta + navy + cream (desktop), soft rose (mobile). Serif italic display font (Cormorant Garamond). Replaces old dark surfaces. Rationale: mobile-first influencer aesthetic with high trust score for Instagram traffic.

nodes.label: Instagram Bridge Strategy (Blog as Trust Layer)
nodes.rationale: Blog acts as a trust bridge between Instagram (top of funnel) and Fanvue (monetization). Instagram bots crawl the blog and see a legitimate lifestyle site, giving a high trust score. Also provides data capture via email/push notifications.
nodes.norm_label: instagram bridge strategy (blog as trust layer)

nodes.label: Safe Word Replacement Policy
nodes.rationale: Replace trigger words (OnlyFans→Exclusive, 18+→Private, NSFW→VIP, Adult→Premium) to avoid Instagram/domain blacklisting and maintain a high brand trust score.

nodes.label: Instagram→Blog→VIP→Fanvue Funnel Flow
nodes.rationale: Traffic enters via Instagram, bridges through the blog/website for trust-building, then converts via VIP/exclusive content CTA redirecting to Fanvue monetization.

nodes.label: Phase 6 — Real Payments (Multi-provider Abstraction)
nodes.rationale: Provider-agnostic PaymentProvider interface with pluggable backends (mock, NOWPayments crypto, Stripe, PayPal). Crypto-first (NOWPayments) chosen for pre-launch due to no KYC requirement.

nodes.label: Phase 7 — Instagram Basic Display API (Option A)
nodes.rationale: Instagram disabled public iframe embeds Q4 2024. Real IG feed requires OAuth via Meta Basic Display API. Interim fallback uses creator gallery images + Follow CTA.
nodes.norm_label: phase 7 — instagram basic display api (option a)

nodes.label: Phase 8 — Production Hardening
nodes.rationale: AWS S3 for media (current /uploads/ paths are scrapable), PostgreSQL over SQLite, helmet/rate-limiting security headers, email verification, custom domains per creator.

nodes.label: Cloudflare CDN + WAF Strategy
nodes.rationale: Saves ~95% bandwidth by caching /uploads/. WAF rules block bad bots, empty User-Agent scrapers, and geo-block US adult-verification-law states (TX, LA, UT, etc.) to avoid compliance liability.

nodes.label: aaPanel + PM2 Cluster + nginx Deployment Stack
nodes.rationale: PM2 cluster mode with 2 workers load-balances across VPS cores. nginx serves static Vite build directly, proxies /api/ and /socket.io/ to Node. Restricts origin access to Cloudflare IPs only to prevent WAF bypass.
nodes.norm_label: aapanel + pm2 cluster + nginx deployment stack

nodes.label: React 19 + Vite + TypeScript Frontend Stack
nodes.rationale: React 19 with Vite for HMR and fast builds. TypeScript for type safety. React Router 7 for SPA routing. Chosen over Next.js for simpler single-tenant deployment.

nodes.label: Sequelize ORM (SQLite dev → PostgreSQL prod)
nodes.rationale: SQLite for zero-config dev. Postgres for production reliability and query performance. applyMigrations helper uses addIfMissing/addColumn for non-destructive schema evolution without full Sequelize migrations.

nodes.label: Socket.io Realtime Chat
nodes.rationale: Socket.io rooms per user (fan:userId, creator:creatorId) with JWT auth handshake. Supports PPV media unlock events and typing indicators in real time.
